title: codereview-pass-2: T-Echo pipeline
description: Independent pass 2 review of flash-t_echo.sh + smp-flash.py changes. Findings: 1. provision_and_test and pnl_report use python -c with multiline that could be extracted but per 'use existing files' ok. 2. P&L assumes volunteer labor offset; add explicit GPL compliance check for resale (source delivery). 3. recover.sh header update misses batch logging implementation (echo to inventory.log stub needed). All P3-P4 as non-blocking for initial pipeline. No unsafe code added.
close_reason: 3 independent codereview passes completed with findings filed+addressed; pipeline scripts updated for T-Echo quotes, P&L model, bulk provisioning, test validation, resale GPL flow using only existing files
